statement.en: Lean 4 progress: Hammer Demo — 13 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: Hammer Demo — 定理 13 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1007 (α) — Hammer / aesop / polyrith demo
  藤本伸樹 + Claude Opus 4.7 — 2026-04-28

  Demonstrates available Lean 4 hammer-style tactics in the Rei-AIOS project:
    - `aesop`     — Mathlib-bundled, generic search (already installed)
    - `polyrith`  — polynomial arithmetic + Sage backend
    - `omega`     — linear arith over Nat/Int (decision procedure)
    - `nlinarith` — non-linear arith
    - `decide`    — decidable proposition decision procedure
    - `native_decide` — same, but compiled native (faster for large cases)
    - LeanCopilot `suggest_tactics` / `select_premises` — currently

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
